chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 136 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.717/2022 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.718/2022 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 17-02-2022 Mr. Abdul Wahab Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. This Petition has been filed against some appointment process initiated in the year 2013. Admittedly Laches are involved, and while confronted Petitioners’ Counsel has not been able to satisfactorily respond except relying on order dated 26-01-2022 passed in C. P. No. D- 1416 of 2020 at Circuit Court, Hyderabad. We have gone through the said order which has been placed before us without copy of the petition and therefore, not sure that whether it is based on identical facts or not; nonetheless, even otherwise, we are not convinced as to the binding effect of the sad order, as it has not dilated upon the facts or the law and is without any reasons. The Petition is hit by laches, for which there is no satisfactory response except the above. In view of such position, the Petition is not maintainable and is hereby dismissed with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
